name: D+Q diabetic kidney disease senescent-cell biomarker pilot
summary: Open-label phase 1 pilot testing whether a short oral course of dasatinib plus quercetin reduces senescent-cell and SASP markers in people with diabetic kidney disease.
population: Nine older adults with diabetic kidney disease, low eGFR, and obesity-associated metabolic risk.

trial_details.watch_status_reason: Publication PMID 31542391 already captures the study results; the no-posted-results state is registry-maintenance context only.
trial_details.horizon_note: Published human biomarker pilot; ClinicalTrials.gov had no posted registry results in the June 11, 2026 API query.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This is the cleanest direct human senescent-cell burden signal for D+Q, but it is small, open-label, short-horizon, and disease-specific.
